title: Extracting Sentiment and Emotions from Complex User Reviews
scenario: Extract sentiment and emotions from complex user reviews, such as product reviews and social media posts. The reviews may contain multiple mentions of products, services, and emotions. The target LLM output should be a list of JSON objects, each representing a review with its corresponding sentiment, emotion, and confidence score.
constraints: Must use multi-class classification to identify emotions

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify the accuracy of the extracted sentiment and emotions in the JSON output.
Check if the generated JSON output meets the constraints and requirements.
Check if the generated JSON output accurately uses multi-class classification to identify emotions.
